description.text: Turn your foes in to dead pixels. One Base.

ru.original: Turn your foes in to dead pixels. One Base.
ru.translation: Сделай из врагов битые пиксели. Одна база.

es.original: Turn your foes in to dead pixels. One Base.
es.translation:
Convierte a tus rivales en píxeles muertos.
Un núcleo.

de.original: Turn your foes in to dead pixels. One Base.
de.translation: Verwandelt eure Gegner in tote Pixel. Eine Basis.

fr.original: Turn your foes in to dead pixels. One Base.
fr.translation: Transformez vos ennemis en pixels morts. Une base.

pt.original: Turn your foes in to dead pixels. One Base.
pt.translation: Transforme seus inimigos em pixels mortos. Uma Base.
